headerDisplay: Ariston NET Velis/Lydos water heater. Uses cloud API to read/set temperature and power.
footerDisplay: Tip: If the device behaves oddly, delete ariston-heater-cache.json from the plugin data path to force re-detection of the API variant.

gateway.title: Plant ID (optional)
gateway.description: If empty, auto-discovers the first available Velis/Lydos device.

pollInterval.title: Idle Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh state when the heater is idle (off, not heating). Default 1800 (30 min), minimum 300 (5 min).

fastPollInterval.title: Heating Poll Interval (seconds)
fastPollInterval.description: How often to refresh state when the heater is actively heating. Default 120 (2 min), minimum 30. Must be less than idle interval.

cooldownCycles.title: Cooldown Cycles
cooldownCycles.description: Number of fast-poll cycles to keep after heating stops before switching to idle interval. Catches thermal inertia.
